title: helichrysum fragrans
intro: Helichrysum fragrans, also known as the African helichrysum or yellow flower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of helichrysum fragrans are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
